items.q: How do you say 'I prefer pop music'?
items.why: Students mismatch gender and forget the article; 'musique' is feminine, so 'la musique'.
Students guess film genres; 'd'horreur' indicates a horror film.

items.q: How do you give an opinion about a TV programme?
items.why: Students misuse 'trouver' and word order; 'je trouve + noun + adjective' gives a clear opinion.

items.q: What does 'la mode' mean in this topic?
items.why: The answer examiners want is: Fashion. “A maths average” is the distractor this question was built around — if it tempted you, that's the exact gap to close.
